default_binding.ENTRANCE: the gate of the night market
default_binding.WISH_MARKET: A Wish Big Enough to Share

slots.meaning: The child protagonist.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable child explorer (name); kind, capable, never reckless.

slots.meaning: The small, shy new friend the hero meets and helps throughout the story.
slots.guidance: A gentle, non-human or lightly-fantastical companion who needs help at the start and grows braver by the end; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The companion's species or kind, reused whenever the story refers to her generically rather than by name.
slots.guidance: A small, harmless, sympathetic creature; consistent with COMPANION throughout.

slots.meaning: The trusted grown-up who brings the hero to the event and is present at arrival and any early departure.
slots.guidance: A warm, unworried adult; never the source of any rule or danger, just steady company.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, festive place the evening happens inside.
slots.guidance: A safe, warmly lit gathering place; wonder over dread; no lethal hazards, no toxic air, nothing that truly threatens a child.

slots.meaning: The single gate/entry point the hero and companion arrive through.
slots.guidance: Always reachable and safe; the story opens here.

slots.meaning: The central gathering spot the hero returns to between stalls and from which every stall and the finale can be reached.
slots.guidance: A round, welcoming heart of the setting; safe to linger in at any time.

slots.meaning: The closing communal celebration the whole evening builds toward (bare noun phrase, no leading article).
slots.guidance: A warm, inclusive, joyful gathering any small child would recognize as fun and safe; never competitive or exclusionary.

slots.meaning: The specific spot where the closing celebration takes place.
slots.guidance: A welcoming focal point at the heart of THRESHOLD; always open to latecomers.

slots.meaning: The small object the companion carries and prepares to launch/complete at the celebration; must be an object with a wick and flame to light, since the fixed beats around it keep lantern-lighting vocabulary (frame, wick, flame) unslotted.
slots.guidance: A gentle, carriable object that can be dressed with a string and lit with a small flame; never hazardous to light or hold.

slots.meaning: The first of three small things the companion lost and needs before the celebration; recovered at ROUTE_B's stall.
slots.guidance: A short noun phrase for a simple, harmless craft item.

slots.meaning: The second of three small things the companion lost; recovered at ROUTE_E's stall.
slots.guidance: A short noun phrase for a simple, harmless craft item, distinct from ITEM1 and ITEM3.

slots.meaning: The third of three small things the companion lost; recovered at ROUTE_C's stall.
slots.guidance: A short noun phrase for a simple, harmless source of light or warmth, distinct from ITEM1 and ITEM2.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_A at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_A's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the keeper who runs ROUTE_A's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the food ROUTE_A's stall makes and serves.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_B at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_B's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the keeper who runs ROUTE_B's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the craft material ROUTE_B's stall works with.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_C at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_C's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the keeper who runs ROUTE_C's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the drink ROUTE_C's stall serves.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_D at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_D's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the keeper who runs ROUTE_D's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the objects ROUTE_D's stall repairs.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_E at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_E's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the keeper who runs ROUTE_E's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the produce ROUTE_E's stall sells.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: the sensory cue announcing ROUTE_F at the hub.
slots.guidance: A distinct, benign sensory pull (a smell, sight, or sound); clearly different from the other five stalls.

slots.meaning: the place/stall for ROUTE_F's errand.
slots.guidance: A benign, welcoming stall or table; nothing hazardous.

slots.meaning: the lead performer at ROUTE_F's stall.
slots.guidance: A kind, patient adult stall keeper; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: the art form ROUTE_F's stall practices.
slots.guidance: A simple, harmless good or craft appropriate to the stall.

slots.meaning: The small keepsake ROUTE_D's keeper clips onto the companion's lantern as a repair gift.
slots.guidance: A tiny, harmless charm or trinket.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when ROUTE_A's risky choice is taken (setback). Names ending e_ds_spill via the template 'Runaway {ROUTE_A_MISHAP}'.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm; everyone heads home to try again next time.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when ROUTE_C's risky choice is taken (setback); the whole title. Names ending e_tc_slosh.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when ROUTE_D's risky choice is taken (setback); the whole title. Names ending e_tm_spring.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the silly, harmless mishap when ROUTE_F's risky choice is taken (setback); the whole title. Names ending e_mc_gong.
slots.guidance: A funny, embarrassing hiccup with zero real harm.

slots.meaning: Ending: the companion's own wish written exactly as whispered (completion); the whole title. Names ending e_wish_pip.
slots.guidance: Positive; a private, tender moment between hero and companion.

slots.meaning: Ending: a second wish added for the whole community (success); the whole title. Names ending e_wish_market.
slots.guidance: Positive; generous, communal in scope.

slots.meaning: Ending: the companion writes her own wish herself (discovery); the whole title. Names ending e_wish_brave.
slots.guidance: Positive; celebrates the companion finding her own voice/courage.

slots.meaning: Ending: the companion lights the lantern by herself (completion); the whole title. Names ending e_light_pip.
slots.guidance: Positive; a proud, confidence-building moment for the companion.

slots.meaning: Ending: hero and companion light the lantern together (success); the whole title. Names ending e_light_together.
slots.guidance: Positive; a shared, joyful moment of friendship.

slots.meaning: Ending: the oldest keeper lights the lantern the traditional way (completion); the whole title. Names ending e_light_keeper.
slots.guidance: Positive; warm, tied to the setting's tradition.

slots.meaning: Ending: the companion leads the countdown to launch (success); the whole title. Names ending e_up_pip.
slots.guidance: Positive; the companion's new brave voice takes center stage.

slots.meaning: Ending: the whole gathered crowd counts down together (completion); the whole title. Names ending e_up_chorus.
slots.guidance: Positive; communal, everyone included.

slots.meaning: Ending: the gathered musicians hum the launch instead of counting (success); the whole title. Names ending e_up_song.
slots.guidance: Positive; music carries the lantern up instead of a count.
